creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 186450
5.33.1 patch

Simple update to 5.33.1

Changelog (http://lalescu.ro/liviu/fet/news.html):
- crash bug fixed (reported by me :) )
- very rare but important generation bug fixed
- added the number of working hours for the teachers and the students in the HTML timetables statistics
- bug fix: when moving rooms/buildings up/down in their corresponding dialogs, the description on the right was not updated correspondingly
- updated translations

Poudriere testport OK (http://freebsd.uzsolt.hu/logs/deskutils/fet/10amd64-head/fet-5.33.1.log)
